zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持窄幅震荡结构，价格贴近6.92一线运行，整体动能偏弱但未破位下行，短线仍处整理区间，市场观望情绪较重。

SMA20位于6.8678构成短期支撑，现价站上均线显示多头略占优势。MACD柱值微正但动能有限，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限，趋势确认不足。

下方6.91形成短期支撑密集区，上方6.9475附近为近期阻力区域，若放量突破阻力则有望延伸反弹空间，结构仍偏震荡运行中。

短线建议以区间交易为主，在6.91上方逢低分批吸纳，接近6.95-6.95上沿逐步止盈，若跌破6.91需控制风险并等待新结构。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase following a minor 24-hour decline of 0.16%. Price action remains compressed between 6.9103 and 6.9475, indicating low volatility and indecision among market participants. Despite the slight downward bias, the pair continues to trade above its 20-day SMA at 6.86782, suggesting the broader short-term structure is still mildly constructive rather than decisively bearish.

Momentum indicators provide a mixed but slightly positive tone. The MACD reading of 0.0083 indicates a marginal bullish impulse, although the absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI (14) not available, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed reliably, leaving momentum interpretation dependent primarily on price structure and moving average behavior, which currently favors a neutral-to-slightly bullish stance.

Immediate support is established at 6.9103, followed by stronger structural support near the 20-day SMA at 6.8678. A breakdown below this zone could expose deeper retracement risk. On the upside, resistance is seen at 6.9475, with a psychological barrier around 7.0000 acting as the next key level. A sustained break above this range would be required to confirm renewed bullish continuation.

From a trading perspective, AVAX/USD is best approached as a range-bound market until a clear breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support levels with tight risk controls, targeting resistance for partial profit-taking. Alternatively, waiting for a decisive move above 6.95 or below 6.87 may offer higher-quality directional setups. Given subdued volatility, patience and disciplined entries remain essential.
